chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, CIRCUIT COURT, HYDERABAD C.P No.D-2914 of 2016 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE 1. For orders on office objection 2. For hearing of M.A No.15675/2016 3. For hearing of main case 28.01.2019. Barrister Jawad Qureshi, advocate for the petitioner Mr. Allah Bachayo Soomro, Additional A.G *** 1to3. Learned counsel for the petitioner has filed a statement to the effect that ‘No Objection Certificate’ has been restored by respondent No.6/Director Planning & Development Control, Hyderabad Development Authority, Hyderabad, as such, he does not press this petition, which is accordingly dismissed as not pressed alongwith pending application(s). JUDGE JUDGE Sajjad Ali Jessar
